name: Skills 1
description: Three independently scored skill tests — an L-sit hold, a softball throw for distance, and a handstand walk for distance — with the final ranking based on the sum of the three placings.
source_notes: games.crossfit.com/workouts/games/2011/5 (official CrossFit Games event), retrieved 2026-07-10; three independently-ranked skill tests; final score is the sum of the three individual rankings (lower total wins)

movements.notes: softball; 2 attempts, scored by furthest throw
1 attempt for maximum distance, with a mulligan allowed if under 5 yards
